global.title: Convoy of tankers is seen leaving Gulf, vessel tracking data shows - Reuters
global.summary: A convoy of tankers was seen departing the Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz, signaling a tentative easing in a volatile shipping corridor after days of uncertainty.
global.whyItMatters: This is a fresh sign of possible de-escalation with direct implications for fuel prices, economic anxiety, and prayers for peace.

global.title: How Paul Quinn evaded justice for over 20 years…until now | BBC News - Modern Ghana
global.summary: BBC coverage highlights that the 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is now under way, with early signs of relief in parts of Lebanon even as the situation remains fragile.
global.whyItMatters: Pastors may want to pray and speak about peacemaking, trauma, and the need for wise hope rather than quick triumphalism.

global.title: Opening Bell: April 16, 2026 - CNBC
global.summary: CNBC reports New York Fed President Williams warning that war could slow growth and worsen inflation, underscoring how conflict is still shaping the wider economy.
global.whyItMatters: Economic strain affects families in the pews; this helps frame pastoral care around fear, provision, and financial pressure.

persecutedChurch.title: BISHOP ROBERT BARRON: The war on Christians is real and the world can no longer stay silent - Fox News
persecutedChurch.summary: Bishop Robert Barron argues that global anti-Christian persecution remains severe, pointing to widespread hostility, imprisonment, and killings in multiple regions.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It can help Kris lead informed prayer, solidarity, and teaching on costly discipleship in the global church.

leadership.title: How Emotional Intelligence Can Help Activate Your ‘Culture Code’ - Forbes
leadership.summary: Forbes argues that emotional intelligence is essential in seasons of change, helping leaders build trust through candor, care, and consistent communication.
leadership.whyItMatters: Useful for shaping church staff culture, volunteer leadership, and change conversations with grace and clarity.

goodNews.title: Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed - New Hampshire Public Radio
goodNews.summary: NHPR tells the story of a man whose life turned when someone simply asked, 'Can I pray for you?' in a moment of despair.
goodNews.whyItMatters: A strong reminder that small acts of prayerful presence can become life-changing ministry moments.
